  "confidence_score": 0.95,
  "attack_summary": "A WmiPrvSE.exe process engaged in highly suspicious activities indicative of credential dumping and Active Directory reconnaissance. It connected to the LSASS named pipe, loaded security-related DLLs, and modified Active Directory LDAP provider registry settings. These actions suggest an attacker is attempting to gain credentials and map the domain environment.",
